title: Multi-gene phylogenetic and taxonomic contributions to Xylaria (Ascomycota) associated with fallen fruits from China
author: Zhu, An-Hong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: Figure 2 Xylaria aleuriticola (FCATAS858, holotype)...
steps.instruction: Figure 2 Xylaria aleuriticola (FCATAS858, holotype) a, b stromata on fallen fruits c stromatal surface d, e section through stroma, showing perithecia f asci in Melzer's reagent g asci in water h ascospores in Melzer's reagent i ascal apical ring in Melzer's reagent j, k ascospore in 1% SDS l ascospore in India ink m ascospore with germ slit in India ink. Scale bars: 2 cm (a, b); 100 µm (c, e); 200 µm (d); 10 µm (f–m).
